title: Otzar Founder Requirements Register
controlling_rule: Nothing is complete until register + implementation + tests + live proof + regression.

requirements.exact_requirement: Every normal login lands on role-appropriate Home (/app for employees); prior arbitrary route is not restored.
requirements.founder_intent: YC first-use: authentication establishes a fresh Home session.
requirements.user_value: User always knows where they are after login.

requirements.exact_requirement: Pre-auth deep links validated before restore; admin/sensitive shells never auto-restore.
requirements.founder_intent: Pre-auth deep links validated before restore; admin/sensitive shells never auto-restore.
requirements.live_acceptance: returnTo admin path → Home; validated /app/* deep link ok

requirements.exact_requirement: First-time compact role-aware reveal on Today (leader/manager/teammate CTAs).
requirements.founder_intent: First-time compact role-aware reveal on Today (leader/manager/teammate CTAs).
requirements.live_acceptance: First-use strip shows role CTA; dismissible

requirements.exact_requirement: Walkthrough completion server-side and versioned; distinct paths for admin, CEO, manager, employee, contractor.
requirements.founder_intent: Walkthrough completion server-side and versioned; distinct paths for admin, CEO, manager, employee, contractor.

requirements.exact_requirement: YC first five minutes: immediate signal, aha, real data/action.
requirements.founder_intent: YC first five minutes: immediate signal, aha, real data/action.
requirements.remaining_gap: Dedicated synthetic YC org continuous harness remains S-01 (phase 7)

requirements.exact_requirement: Org switching resets to new org Home without blending state.
requirements.founder_intent: Org switching resets to new org Home without blending state.
requirements.remaining_gap: Org switch UX proof not continuous in current smokes

requirements.exact_requirement: Sole-admin lockout copy is honest; recovery path documented.
requirements.founder_intent: Sole-admin lockout copy is honest; recovery path documented.
requirements.live_acceptance: SUSPENDED message never says contact your administrator only

requirements.exact_requirement: Today is one-shot ADHD-safe: Focus ≤3, glance chips, Talk.
requirements.founder_intent: Today is one-shot ADHD-safe: Focus ≤3, glance chips, Talk.
requirements.live_acceptance: No scroll wall of cards on first paint

requirements.exact_requirement: Home counts reconcile with actual visible objects; every card explains why and links exact object.
requirements.founder_intent: Home counts reconcile with actual visible objects; every card explains why and links exact object.

requirements.exact_requirement: Resolved work leaves open surfaces; stale labeled; Next is real decision.
requirements.founder_intent: Resolved work leaves open surfaces; stale labeled; Next is real decision.
requirements.remaining_gap: Stale badge only appears when pending actions age past 7d

requirements.exact_requirement: What changed / team activity from real state; missing integrations explained specifically.
requirements.founder_intent: What changed / team activity from real state; missing integrations explained specifically.

requirements.exact_requirement: Home differs by role (CEO/manager/employee/contractor).
requirements.founder_intent: Home differs by role (CEO/manager/employee/contractor).
requirements.remaining_gap: Role maps from title/admin; live titles may not match contractor archetype

requirements.exact_requirement: Full employee+admin route and control inventory; every screen earns existence.
requirements.founder_intent: Full employee+admin route and control inventory; every screen earns existence.

requirements.exact_requirement: Admin vs employee shells separated; Scenario Studio/Playground hidden from primary admin nav.
requirements.founder_intent: Admin vs employee shells separated; Scenario Studio/Playground hidden from primary admin nav.

requirements.exact_requirement: No dead buttons, fake metrics, coming-soon in primary paths.
requirements.founder_intent: No dead buttons, fake metrics, coming-soon in primary paths.

requirements.exact_requirement: Blind spots/corrections/obligations/handoffs/evidence live in contextual work surfaces.
requirements.founder_intent: Blind spots/corrections/obligations/handoffs/evidence live in contextual work surfaces.
requirements.remaining_gap: Some routes still exist as legacy pages

requirements.exact_requirement: Viewport chrome Otzar/Work OS/Talk/notifications stay in visual viewport.
requirements.founder_intent: Viewport chrome Otzar/Work OS/Talk/notifications stay in visual viewport.

requirements.exact_requirement: More drawer zero-noise: Tools findable; growth not walling People.
requirements.founder_intent: More drawer zero-noise: Tools findable; growth not walling People.

requirements.exact_requirement: Ambient presence states (available/listening/working/blocked/complete) without distraction.
requirements.founder_intent: Ambient presence states (available/listening/working/blocked/complete) without distraction.

requirements.exact_requirement: Voice-first text-second; voice drives work not decorative page.
requirements.founder_intent: Voice-first text-second; voice drives work not decorative page.
test_requirements: unit: voice-work-first + ambient D-02 rail markers
live deep: otzar-live-voice-d02 (A–J multi-scenario hard fail)
requirements.live_acceptance: Deep smoke pass=all: voice-work-rail, mic primary, text secondary, work commands, transcript→cards, /app/voice drives-work, Needs me link, no fake voice

final_proof.notes: D02-D-blocked treated utterance as context once — still work-path, not decorative

requirements.exact_requirement: Purposeful 3D optional; reduced-motion 2D fallback; spatial readiness.
requirements.founder_intent: Purposeful 3D optional; reduced-motion 2D fallback; spatial readiness.

requirements.exact_requirement: Selected-window context only with explicit permission; no covert surveillance.
requirements.founder_intent: Selected-window context only with explicit permission; no covert surveillance.
requirements.remaining_gap: Method extraction API still future; browser picker not e2e-automatable

requirements.exact_requirement: Dandelion discovers/proposes people, roles, managers, teams, projects, externals.
requirements.founder_intent: Dandelion discovers/proposes people, roles, managers, teams, projects, externals.
requirements.remaining_gap: Not all proposal classes source-driven continuous

requirements.exact_requirement: Proposals preserve source, confidence, alternatives; admin confirms authority-affecting.
requirements.founder_intent: Proposals preserve source, confidence, alternatives; admin confirms authority-affecting.

requirements.exact_requirement: Observed participation ≠ authority; employee/contractor/vendor/customer distinguished.
requirements.founder_intent: Observed participation ≠ authority; employee/contractor/vendor/customer distinguished.

requirements.exact_requirement: People surface shows reporting structure glance; admin can set reporting line.
requirements.founder_intent: People surface shows reporting structure glance; admin can set reporting line.

requirements.exact_requirement: Admin drag-and-drop hierarchy editor with bulk confirm, undo, audit, a11y, virtualization.
requirements.founder_intent: Admin drag-and-drop hierarchy editor with bulk confirm, undo, audit, a11y, virtualization.
requirements.remaining_gap: No drag-drop editor; only form assign

requirements.exact_requirement: Matrix/dotted-line, contractor sponsor, executive without manager.
requirements.founder_intent: Matrix/dotted-line, contractor sponsor, executive without manager.
requirements.remaining_gap: Edge relationship types not full UI

requirements.exact_requirement: Hierarchy separate from RBAC/ABAC/TAR/decision rights/tool authority.
requirements.founder_intent: Hierarchy separate from RBAC/ABAC/TAR/decision rights/tool authority.

requirements.exact_requirement: AI Teammates start from role templates not empty chatbots.
requirements.founder_intent: AI Teammates start from role templates not empty chatbots.
requirements.remaining_gap: First session per role not fully productized

requirements.exact_requirement: Authority from Foundation not template; Twin tied to human/org/team/projects/autonomy.
requirements.founder_intent: Authority from Foundation not template; Twin tied to human/org/team/projects/autonomy.

requirements.exact_requirement: Teach Otzar how you work end-to-end with consent, review, approve/reject/revoke.
requirements.founder_intent: Teach Otzar how you work end-to-end with consent, review, approve/reject/revoke.

requirements.exact_requirement: No raw confidential source in reusable memory; org policy overrides.
requirements.founder_intent: No raw confidential source in reusable memory; org policy overrides.

requirements.exact_requirement: Approved learning changes later work; rejected never applies.
requirements.founder_intent: Approved learning changes later work; rejected never applies.

requirements.exact_requirement: User-owned portable professional core vs org-bound Twin relationships.
requirements.founder_intent: User-owned portable professional core vs org-bound Twin relationships.

requirements.exact_requirement: One user multiple orgs without blended memory.
requirements.founder_intent: One user multiple orgs without blended memory.

requirements.exact_requirement: Project mission heart: people, open work, blockers, AI, docs pulse in viewport.
requirements.founder_intent: Project mission heart: people, open work, blockers, AI, docs pulse in viewport.

requirements.founder_intent: Full project spine: objective, owners, truth, obligations, meetings, next-best.

requirements.exact_requirement: Conversation resolves to project safely; routine work not multi-page maze.
requirements.founder_intent: Conversation resolves to project safely; routine work not multi-page maze.
requirements.live_acceptance: Talk Open project {name} → one hop heart; list path honest; non-project not hijacked

final_proof.sample: Open project [SMOKE] pilot → heart one hop; action center not hijacked

requirements.exact_requirement: Comms ambient sync primary; paste fallback; work items created under governance.
requirements.founder_intent: Comms ambient sync primary; paste fallback; work items created under governance.

requirements.exact_requirement: Honest reconnect path when Meet/scopes fail (no false green).
requirements.founder_intent: Honest reconnect path when Meet/scopes fail (no false green).

requirements.founder_intent: Communication lineage → decisions/commitments/obligations/truth candidates.

requirements.founder_intent: Governed AI-to-AI collaboration envelope with audit; fail closed.
